31675.title: Call the Midwife
31675.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

31676.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
31676.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

31677.title: Sanditon
31677.description: Charlotte sets out to avoid Sidney, until an accident forces them together and to reappraise each other. When Tom brings a new doctor to the town, he and Lady Denham clash and Clara makes a bold move in her bid to outplay Sir Edward and Esther.

31678.title: The Kettering Incident
31678.description: Anna wakes out of a fugue in her father's house the morning after the party. Meanwhile, Chloe has gone missing and Grayson, Roy and Max seem to be sharing a dark secret.

31679.title: Impossible
31679.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

31684.title: Bargain Hunt
31684.description: Natasha Raskin presents from the market town of Newark in Nottinghamshire, where she is joined by experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. The teams are made up of two married couples, and each buy three items which they hope will make them a profit at auction.

31685.title: Casualty
31685.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.

31686.title: Father Brown
31686.description: When radio quiz `Up to You' comes to Kembleford, Father Brown suspects that one of the cast is responsible for their landlady's murder.

31687.title: Bargain Hunt
31687.description: At the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire, a father and daughter take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, and they all have their sights set on a golden gavel. One team falls in love with a handmade dolls house while the other team sets sights on a pair of Edwardian glass eyes. Also, Anita travels to Sheffield, famous for its cutlery industry, to uncover the story of some pioneering women: the infamous Buffer Girls.

31691.title: Bargain Hunt
31691.description: The location is in the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire. Presenter Eric Knowles leads the fray and the experts are Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two teams of married couples take on each other to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction. One team can't get away from ceramics and the other find an unusual American clock.

31694.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
31694.description: A workplace compensation claim is not as straightforward as it first seems. Frank is sceptical when a long-lost relative tracks him down.

31695.description: Natasha Raskin presents from the market town of Newark in Nottinghamshire, where she is joined by experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. The teams are made up of two married couples, and each buy three items which they hope will make them a profit at auction.

31696.title: Bad Move
31696.description: When Nicky and Steve discover their kitchen has flooded, Steve thinks the source of the flooding is a natural spring and hopes it will be the answer to all their problems.

31697.title: Keeping Up Appearances
31697.description: With Hyacinth so excited about attending a country house sale, Richard is worried that she'll spend too much.

31700.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
31700.description: George helps more homeowners make their period homes fit for modern life, taking on an outmoded 1930s semi in Liverpool for teachers Simon and Sofie and a stunning medieval farmhouse in Kent that is like a perfectly preserved time capsule.
31700.category: Reality, Home & Garden, Bouwen en verbouwen

31701.title: Doctors
31701.description: Workplace crushes hot up for Daniel and Bear, but only Daniel is enjoying the attention. Karen intervenes when a bitterly divorced couple arrive for appointments at the same time.

31702.title: EastEnders
31702.description: Mick's misfortune leaves Linda feeling abandoned. Ruby and Lily make a breakthrough, Bernie is left disappointed, and Rocky vows to help Sonia.

31703.title: Bargain Hunt
31703.description: Anita Manning hosts from Epsom Racecourse in Surrey with experts Danny Sebastian and David Harper. The blues are after golden gavels while the reds are spending big. Meanwhile, Anita finds out about the fascinating history of Epsom racecourse.

31704.title: Unforgotten
31704.description: Enquiries into David Walker's past suggest that he was a troubled man with a number of issues. Marion has a prickly chat with Cassie about her past.

31705.title: Call the Midwife
31705.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

31706.title: The Kettering Incident
31706.description: Anna wakes in the asylum with Dr McKenzie waiting for her, but she stealthily escapes while McKenzie is out of the room. Meanwhile, Dane finally hears Eliza calling from under the dam.
